_comment: All durations are in seconds. calibrationDuration is initial setup. baselineDuration and stimulationDuration are runtime phases. surveyDurationEstimate controls ETA in control-room panel; taggingDuration is the legacy alias used by the setup-time estimator fallback. Both are set to ~100s based on measured survey time in recorded sessions (median trial cycle ~158s minus 60s of timed phases). Preferred estimates come from /api/timing-stats; these values are only the fallback.
